fato_historico: 1799: Tekle Giyorgis I begins his first of six reigns as Emperor of Ethiopia.
energia_do_dia: The cosmos hums with a regal vibration today, reminiscent of ancient transitions of power and new beginnings. You may feel a spark of ambition igniting within, suggesting it is a good time to claim your space. Consider this momentum a golden opportunity to step into your own authentic throne with courage, grace, and purposeful passion.
frase_do_dia: Your inner light is the crown you wear every single day.
significado_numero: A powerful number representing the discovery of your true purpose.
conselho: Lead with your heart and trust your natural rhythm to guide you.
